heading: Penalty
label: 8906 Penalty
text: An owner, charterer, managing operator, agent, master, or individual in charge of a vessel operated in violation of this chapter or a regulation prescribed under this chapter is liable to the United States Government for a civil penalty of not more than $25,000. The vessel also is liable in rem for the penalty.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource section (U.S. Code)890646:390dSection 8906 prescribes the penalties for violations of this chapter.
Amendments1996— substituted “not more than $25,000” for “$1,000”.Pub. L. 104–324
